reviews.review_description: To start find the breaker on the wall outside the building..
Short but thrilling. No puzzles or anything like that. You explore with a flashlight until you find the diary.

Creep factor 10/10 but way to many unnecessary sound effects tho you guys through everything including the kitchen sink in the sound effects department when all that was needed was the guys foot steps. Oh and get rid of the annoying guy talking he ruins the immersion.
This is the best be game you move around I wish it was longer
Scary. I jumped out of my skin several times. Brilliant. Better than watching horror on TV. Could be a little longer

I have found the light switches to the right of a door, but try as I might, I can't get them to turn on, can't get into hospital. I hold the walk forward button on the switches, nothing. Please help. Double tapping only turns my head lamp on and off.
Found my way in....wow. Loved this app. Creepy to say the least. I wish there were more apps like this one. 
Awesome!

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for playing THAD! You need to look for a light switch in the hospital backyard (on the right), before entering it. Just hold the touchpad a bit longer in order to move and double tap when close to the light switch in order to activate them. You can use your controller as well. Hope it helps! Enjoy THAD and do not forget to review it back! ;) Star Consult Team

reviews.review_description: I can't figure out how to open doors and go inside. I don't have a controller just my gear vr.

developer_response.body: Hi there! Thank you for playing THAD! You need to look for a light switch in the hospital backyard (on the right), before entering it. Just hold the touchpad a bit longer in order to move and double tap to interact. Hope it helps! Enjoy THAD ;) Star Consult Team

reviews.review_description: Good jump scares. Loved it.
Very scary made me jump lol
I gave it two stars, and not one, only because I'm difficult when it comes to horror. But this was a waste of money. Sorry folks who made it. Was just, eh... I hate I spent over 3 bucks on it.

I updated my Ocular VR and my apps and it still keeps telling me I need to update Occulas VR, I even restarted my phone, I'm not happy, I paid for this and can't even go past the loading screen, if I could give it a zero I would, I can get into The Cathedral but not this one, WTF?

I liked the game at first, however, the game is based on jump scares and at times the dev team puts the jump scare at the wrong time...time was off or delayed rather, it was getting predictable as time went on. The voice acting is horid, it was monotone and almost depressed, they had no emotion. the story was a great idea though.

I can't get in...I tried....let me know how to get it  side this game..
If not..I would like a refund
ZERO STARS! I turned on the flashlight.. started moving towards a building... then it wouldn't let me move anymore. Restarted and now can't move at all.  For a game a few years old.. c'mon man!!!
Sure it perhaps could be improved but hell i played this alone at home and it scared me a few times... worth the price if you ask me.
I literally just wondered around. I could not get the go controller to do anything apart from to a bloody torch on.

Loved it , had a couple of heart attacks, I'm looking forward to the day that VR gets out of wii graphics though. Back to this really enjoyed it, it's very short but this would be great if it was a much longer game with puzzles thrown in..
Can’t move in game. Waste of money.
I didnt care for it and i wasnt really spooked but thats probably not the games fault so i cant bash it its just kinda meh for me at best
can u please tell me how to get in to the hospital please I don't no how to get in the building
